name: Bell Family YMCA
description: Bell Family YMCA is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Hartwell, GA. There are 10 courts. 6 are indoors and 4 are outdoors. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. A membership is required to play. Players have access to restrooms, water, lights, and trainers or lessons.

name: Cateechee
description: Come play pickleball at Cateechee in Hartwell, GA! There are 6 outdoor asphalt courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. Players have access to food, locker rooms, restrooms, water, lights, a pro shop or equipment store, trainers or lessons, and wheelchair accessibility. The courts can be reserved.
